zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugo II van Naaldwijk於1214年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德茲瓦瓦阿爾時，他的父親Hugo I van Naaldwijk21歲，母親Gerardsdr van Velsen20歲。他於大約1238年與Isabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsen結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1263年享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugo II van Naaldwijk于1214年出生在荷兰-拉藍德茲瓦瓦阿爾时，他的父亲Hugo I van Naaldwijk21岁，母亲Gerardsdr van Velsen20岁。他于大约1238年与Isabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsen结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1263年享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Hugo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of   Hugh  , used throughout the Middle Ages in official documents, and now enjoying a revival as a given name.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugo II van Naaldwijk was born in 1214, in Zwartewaal, South Holland, Netherlands, his father, Hugo I van Naaldwijk, was 21 and his mother, Gerardsdr van Velsen, was 20. He married Isabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsen about 1238. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1263, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugo II van Naaldwijk est né en 1214, à Zwartewaal, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Hugo I van Naaldwijk, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Gerardsdr van Velsen, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsen environ 1238. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1263, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugo II van Naaldwijk 1214 in Zwartewaal, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugo I van Naaldwijk 21 und seine Mutter Gerardsdr van Velsen 20. Er hat um 1238 Isabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1263 im Alter von 49 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugo II van Naaldwijk è nato il nel 1214 nel Zwartewaal, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Hugo I van Naaldwijk, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Gerardsdr van Velsen, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsen circa 1238. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1263, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugo II van Naaldwijkが1214年にオランダズイド-hオランドズワーテワアルで生まれた時，父Hugo I van Naaldwijkは21歳，母Gerardsdr van Velsenは20歳であった。約1238年にIsabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1263年に49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugo II van Naaldwijk(이)가 1214년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 즈워튜알에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugo I van Naaldwijk(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Gerardsdr van Velsen(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1238년 Isabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1263년 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Santpoort-Noord, North Holland, Netherla: Santpoort-Noord, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.Velsen, North Holland, Netherlands: Velsen, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugo II van Naaldwijk nasceu em 1214, em Zwartewaal, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Hugo I van Naaldwijk, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Gerardsdr van Velsen, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsen aproximadamente 1238. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1263, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugo II van Naaldwijk родился в 1214 г. в местности звартюааль, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Hugo I van Naaldwijk было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Gerardsdr van Velsen, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsen около 1238 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1263 г. в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugo II van Naaldwijk nació en 1214, en Zwartewaal, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Hugo I van Naaldwijk, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Gerardsdr van Velsen, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Isabelle Aelbrechtsdr van Velsen aproximadamente 1238. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1263, a la edad de 49 años.
